message.content: {"rulings": [{"id": "2a299656-cb9d-4591-86a8-af080025deab", "relation": "unrelated", "reason": "The technology stack being TypeScript does not conflict with the dev server running on port 3000; these are independent configuration facts."}, {"id": "270833a1-aec6-4314-94f6-99423bf74b79", "relation": "unrelated", "reason": "The client being Halcyon Freight is an identity fact that has no bearing on which port the dev server runs on."}, {"id": "9694eca4-aaff-4cb2-abe5-0de731177e9a", "relation": "unrelated", "reason": "The project name being Meridian is consistent with the new claim but adds no overlapping information; they are independent facts about the same project."}, {"id": "cd2140da-e55f-44b8-b854-59c573a2bb05", "relation": "unrelated", "reason": "Sarah Vance handling scope-related matters is a personnel decision unrelated to the dev server's port configuration."}]}
message.reasoning_content:
Let me analyze the new claim against each existing claim.

NEW CLAIM: "The development server for the Meridian project runs on port 3000."
observed: 2026-04-06
kind: config

CLAIM 1: "The technology stack for the Meridian project uses TypeScript throughout."
observed: 2026-04-06
kind: config
Analysis: The new claim is about the port the dev server runs on. The existing claim is about the technology stack (TypeScript). These are completely different facts about the Meridian project. They can both be true at the same time.
Relation: unrelated

CLAIM 2: "The client for the Meridian project is Halcyon Freight."
observed: 2026-04-06
kind: identity
Analysis: The new claim is about the dev server port. The existing claim is about the client. These are completely different facts. They can both be true at the same time.
Relation: unrelated

CLAIM 3: "The new project is named Meridian."
observed: 2026-04-06
kind: identity
Analysis: The new claim is about the dev server port. The existing claim is about the project name. These are different facts. They can both be true at the same time.
Relation: unrelated

CLAIM 4: "Scope-related matters for the Meridian project are handled through Sarah Vance."
observed: 2026-04-06
kind: decision
Analysis: The new claim is about the dev server port. The existing claim is about who handles scope-related matters. These are different facts. They can both be true at the same time.
Relation: unrelated

None of the existing claims are about the dev server port, so there's no collision. All are unrelated.
